compositions.composition_name: steel material
compositions.evidence_text: A steel material of the disclosure has a chemical composition containing, in mass %: 0.03% to 0.3% C; 0.03% to 1.0% Si; 0.1% to 2.0% Mn; 0.003% to 0.03% P; 0.005% or less S; 0.005% to 0.1% Al; 0.005% to 0.5% Cu; 0.01% to 0.5% Sb; and 0.005% to 0.5% Ni, with a balance being Fe and incidental impurities.

compositions.composition_name: steel material of preferable Nb,Zr,V and/or Ti content
compositions.evidence_text: One or at least two types selected from Nb, Zr, V, and Ti may be included to improve the mechanical properties of the steel material. Regarding each of these elements, the effect of the addition is poor if the content is less than 0.005%, and the mechanical properties of the weld decrease if the content exceeds 0.1%. Therefore, the content is in the range of 0.005% to 0.1%. The content is preferably in the range of 0.005% to 0.05%

evidence_spans.text: One or at least two types selected from Nb, Zr, V, and Ti may be included to improve the mechanical properties of the steel material. Regarding each of these elements, the effect of the addition is poor if the content is less than 0.005%, and the mechanical properties of the weld decrease if the content exceeds 0.1%. Therefore, the content is in the range of 0.005% to 0.1%. The content is preferably in the range of 0.005% to 0.05%
